channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Pages now supports 2 new text formatting options: code blocks and text highlight colors. You can mark up text as inline code and add custom...
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New endpoints for Survey Management API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new Survey Management API endpoints to retrieve detailed information for survey and account instances.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Rebrand "Team Chat" to "Chat"
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | As of March 22, 2026, "Zoom Team Chat" is renamed to "Zoom Chat" or "Chat" (in brief). No feature or functionality is affected by this name change.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 3.1.2
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Fixed CSS style and worker message bugs.

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New enhancements added to Account Management, Quote and Subscription API.

item.title: Zoom - Twenty new APIs and two new webhook events; additional request and response fields in existing endpoints and events
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | Twenty new APIs and two new webhook events; additional request and response fields across over 25 API endpoints and 8 webhook events.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - March 20, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Easily find and set time zones in Google Calendar by searching for city or countryWe’re introducing an improved time zone picker for Google Calendar on the web. Instead of manually scrolling through the list of options, you can now simply search for and select a specific city or country, making it...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New ways to customize and interact with your content in NotebookLM
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing several updates to NotebookLM that give users more flexibility when uploading sources, new ways to create and edit visuals from NotebookLM and improvements to the interactive study tools.More functions and new visual communication toolsSlide revisions: Users can now revise...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Introducing the new Meetings section in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing a dedicated Meetings section in Google Chat—a new way to organize your conversation list and keep your meeting conversations in one place.Previously, meeting conversations lived in your direct messages, often making it difficult to find specific project discussions or meeting...

View release notes →

item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re releasing a number of enhancements to Workspace audit logs, including:Log filtering enhancements for Resource fields in the security investigation tool for Gmail and Google DriveUpdated Application and Network fields available in the Workspace audit log integration with Google Security...

item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing an improved time zone picker for Google Calendar on the web. Instead of manually scrolling through the list of options, you can now simply search for and select a specific city or country, making it easier to coordinate and schedule with others in different time zones.This...

item.title: Slack - Optional scopes have landed
item.description:
Slack

You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - March 13, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Updates to meetings made by a delegate user are now sent in the name of the principalIn Google Calendar this can be set up by sharing an executive’s calendar with “Make changes to events” or “Make changes and manage sharing” permissions with a delegate user. | Learn more about how updates to...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Gemini in Chrome expands to more countries and languages, including Canada, New Zealand, and India
item.description:
Google Workspace

Gemini in Chrome is rolling out now to Canada, New Zealand, and India, and we’re adding support for 50+ more languages across these countries and in the United States. You can see the full list of supported languages here.Gemini in Chrome empowers business and education users with AI tools that...

View release notes →

item.description:
Windows

This update does not include anything new and is designed to test our servicing pipeline for builds in Canary Channel. A restart will be required; d The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1737...

item.title: Google Workspace - Whisk is moving to Flow on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

On April 30, 2026, the best capabilities from Whisk are moving directly into Flow, Google's unified platform for AI-powered image and video creation.Users with active Whisk accounts will receive an email announcing this change. An in-product notification will guide them through migrating their...

View release notes →

This update is available through tw The post Releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8106 and...

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.3.15-1
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: action-required, bug-fix, sdk-version | Addresses a WebRTC issue that caused session negotiation failures and fallback to WASM on Chrome 147 and later. If you rely on WebRTC video, we strongly advise that you upgrade to ensure compatibility with upcoming Chrome versions.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have pag
item.description:
Canva

The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have page dimensions).

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Set status method scope update
item.description:
Slack

The assistant.threads.setStatus API method now accepts either the assistantwrite scope. This allows channel-based apps to use AI loading states in channels, without having to request assistantwrite scope in favor of the chat:write scope exclusively, so update your app soon!

View release notes →

item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Weekly Recap - 02.13.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Booking V9.7.1
item.description:
Korbyt

# What’s New? ## Deep Link to Locate Colleague on Floorplan (Bookit) Implemented a deep link capability in Bookit that enables authenticated users to directly locate a colleague’s booked space on the floorplan via a URL and book near them. ### Key Functionality **Hyperlink Integration** • The...

item.title: NinjaOne - Unify IT Service, Assets, and Operations With NinjaOne 12.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

Release Schedule: January 27 – February 25 NinjaOne’s 12.0 release has arrived to improve how IT teams manage assets, integrate service delivery with business operations, gain insights into profitability and health status, and proactively resolve any recovery issues. MSPs can now sync service...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Super Agents: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Super Agents: The world's first human-like AI AgentsSuper Agents™ are personalized AI teammates that understand your work, use powerful tools, and collaborate like humans. Just describe the problem you want solved, the workflow you want to automate, or where you’re wasting time, and Super Agents...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - ⚡ Join us for a Super Agents AMA on Reddit!
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!We’re excited to announce a special Reddit AMA (Ask Me Anything) with the ClickUp AI Team, all about our latest feature: Super Agents!🗓️ When: Thursday, January 22nd, 10am–12pm PST📍 Where: the r/ClickUp subreddit on RedditThis is your opportunity to connect directly with Michael Van...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Product Recap - 01.12.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Introducing Super Agents™: The world’s first human-like AI agents
item.description:
ClickUp

Today, we’re launching ClickUp Super Agents – the first human‑like AI agents that live inside ClickUp and collaborate with your team like real teammates.These aren’t just chatbots or one‑off automations. Super Agents:See your work the way you do: tasks, docs, chats, meetings, and schedules all in...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - 4.0 Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

4.0: A New Era of Craft, Quality, and ConvergenceA new era starts today. ClickUp 4.0 is crafted from the ground up for perfect human productivity - Projects, Databases, Scheduling, Chats, DMs, Video Calls. And context is maximized, perfect for AI Agents' productivity. ✨ Effortless Navigation,...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed an issue where YouTube element showed an error due to recent changes in YouTube's Terms of Service. - Resolved a styling inheritance issue in Korbyt Create AI Layouts where elements did not...
